layout.name: horizontalDistance
layout.title: Horizontal Distance
layout.tooltip: How far the NPC moves horizontally in each cycle.

layout.name: verticalDistance
layout.title: Vertical Distance
layout.tooltip: How far the NPC moves vertically in each cycle.

layout.name: waitTime
layout.title: Wait Time Percentage
layout.tooltip: How long the NPC spends waiting to move in each cycle (in percentage).

layout.name: useLocalTimer
layout.title: Use Local Timer
layout.tooltip: When ticked, the NPC will use its own timer that is dependent on when it spawned in rather than a timer that's synced for all NPC's.

layout.name: eyeType
layout.title: Eye Type
layout.tooltip: The eye graphic used for this NPC.
